name: Bode Energy Equipment Co., Ltd
summary: Bode Energy Equipment Co., Ltd engages in the research, design, manufacture, and control system integration of industrial automation products in the People's Republic of China. The company offers drilling rig AC variable frequency drive, drilling rig DC drive, compound drive drilling rig electrical, top drive, auto-drilling, and specific drilling rig electrical control systems, as well as TV monitor systems and flush type integrated oil production management systems for use in the petroleum industry. It also provides galvanizing line and draw bending flattener control systems for use in the metallurgy industry, as well as special equipment and hydrodynamic force test control systems. The company is based in Xi'an, the People's Republic of China.
